tasks.subject: Task 1: Core long-poll logic — lib/feedback-wait.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure, testable wait primitive: clamp timeout; resolve on wake-event, terminal-on-connect, or timeout.

**Files:** Create lib/feedback-wait.ts; Test tests/unit/feedback-wait.test.ts

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:unit -- feedback-wait

```json:metadata
{"files": ["lib/feedback-wait.ts", "tests/unit/feedback-wait.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:unit -- feedback-wait", "acceptanceCriteria": ["clampTimeout fallback + clamp", "subscribe before re-check; terminal-on-connect immediate", "wake event resolves with fresh snapshot", "non-wake events ignored", "timeout returns timedOut:true", "unsubscribe always called", "null when snapshot missing"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Route handler — app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/wait/route.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Owner-strict, scope-gated GET clamping timeout via env, returning P2 body + timedOut, no-store.

**Files:** Create app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/wait/route.ts

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm lint && CI=true pnpm build

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/api/plans/[id]/feedback/wait/route.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm lint && CI=true pnpm build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["auth ordering 401/404/403 mirrors feedback route", "timeoutMs clamped via FEEDBACK_WAIT_MAX_MS env", "200 with P2 body + timedOut + no-store", "404 when wait yields null"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: E2e proof — extend tests/e2e/authorization.spec.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove agent token waiting on a pending plan unblocks when a reviewer approves (200, approved, timedOut:false).

**Files:** Modify tests/e2e/authorization.spec.ts

**Verify:** CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- authorization

```json:metadata
{"files": ["tests/e2e/authorization.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm test:e2e -- authorization", "acceptanceCriteria": ["agent token opens wait on pending plan", "owner approves while wait in flight", "wait resolves 200 approved timedOut:false"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Update /pull-feedback skill to loop
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bounded wait loop re-arming until terminal decision or max iterations; surface still-pending.

**Files:** Modify .claude/commands/pull-feedback.md

**Verify:** Manual read-through — bounded loop + terminal exit.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude/commands/pull-feedback.md"], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["loops on feedback/wait?timeoutMs=30000", "stops on approved/changes_requested + presents markdown", "re-arms up to 10 then surfaces still-pending", "env vars + PATCH revise-back documented"]}
```
